title: DISASTER CASE MANAGEMENT - 211info
text: ROGUE FOOD UNITES DISASTER CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and resource navigation services for those affected by the 2020 Labor Day wildfires. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (458) 488-7980 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 488-7980 Disaster Case Management Alternate (541) 238-5055 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Douglas, Jackson, Josephine, and Klamath Counties Services: Disaster Related Case Management Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - NEIGHBORS UNITE MARKETS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
